No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to hunger, food security, or nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course directly aims to '養成良好運動習慣與提升基本運動能力' (develop good exercise habits and improve basic athletic ability), explicitly contributing to physical well-being and preventative health (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and teaches '團隊合作精神' (teamwork spirit) and '了解籃球運動及其發展歷史' (understanding basketball history), contributing to relevant skills and learning outcomes.

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly designated as '體育[男]' (Physical Education [male]), indicating a gender-specific offering that does not promote gender equality.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or awareness.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to peace, justice, or institutional strength.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course emphasizes '學習團隊合作精神' (learning teamwork spirit) and '小組合作' (group cooperation), which are foundational skills for effective partnerships (Target 17.17).
